cards.title: IG Reel 1 - Fear & Greed Index just hit 15
cards.copy:
Walk through what the Fear & Greed Index actually measures. Show the historical data: every time it has been below 20, what happened 12 months later. Not a prediction. Just data.

End with: The question is not whether Bitcoin recovers. It is whether you have a plan when it does.
cards.cta: Comment PLAN for free strategy breakdown (ManyChat)

cards.title: IG Reel 1 - Stop speculating. Start strategising.
cards.copy: The difference between a speculator and a strategist. Speculators react to price. Strategists react to their plan. One makes emotional decisions at the worst possible moments. The other has already decided what to do before the moment arrives.

cards.title: IG Reel 1 - 85% of retail investors lose money
cards.copy: Not because they are stupid. Because they do not have a system. Walk through the three biggest mistakes: no entry framework, no exit framework, and making decisions based on emotion instead of data. Each one is fixable.

cards.title: IG Story - Client Results CTA (Sunday night)
cards.copy:
SUNDAY NIGHT STORY - CLIENT RESULTS

Slide 1: Screenshot or screen recording of a member win (portfolio performance, testimonial quote, or DM conversation with permission). Clean, no personal details visible.

Slide 2: Text overlay on dark background:
"This is what happens when you stop guessing and start following a system."

"[Member name] joined 8 months ago with zero digital asset exposure and no framework."

"Today they have a structured portfolio, a written exit strategy, and the confidence to execute without checking prices every hour."

Slide 3: CTA slide
"Want results like this?"

"We are opening a handful of strategy calls this week."

"DM us the word CLIENT and we will send you the details."

[Add DM link sticker / reply sticker]

Notes: Post between 7-8pm Sunday AEST. This is when engagement peaks for the audience. Use a real member result (check with DT/Reece for a recent win they can share). Keep it factual - what they had before, what they have now. No income figures. No promises. Just the transformation from no system to system.
cards.cta: DM us CLIENT for a free strategy call
